positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    nvp != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    published(neapolitan_chronicles,nvp)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~published(harry_potter,nvp)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    italian != english).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != harry_potter).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    published(palace_of_flies,nvp)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    palace_of_flies != harry_potter).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    nvp != harry_potter).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    nvp != neapolitan_chronicles).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define publishing_house(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_english(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define translated_from(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
